english_text: I am a person of my word
Let us promise to meet again
I will not let you down
Let us meet at the entrance
I will be there at three
I am sorry I cannot make it
Let us do it another time
I will be there in ten minutes
I will text you when I arrive
That day does not work for me
Let us firm up the plans
I will mark it on my calendar
Please do not cancel last minute
I will hold you to that
I will make it up to you
